basicInfo.name: Nightmare Rachel
basicInfo.flavor: After becoming the ruler of Blazing Desert, Rachel gave herself the title of Phoenix Incarnate. Lately, she's been troubled by people targeting the Blazing Desert.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Blazing Strike
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 177% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Defense Reduction. [Duration: 5 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 177% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Phoenix Strike
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 165% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict All Attack Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 165% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Power of Flames
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Weakness Hit Chance Boost. [Always Active]
 - Self
 - Revives with 80% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]

profile.story:
The Blazing Desert was originally a rough, inhospitable land full of frequent desert tribe conflicts.
The Agni family ruled over the desert from their castle built atop a rocky cliffside in the center of the desert, but by Rachel's day, they had fallen into aristocratic snobbery and had lost the support of the surrounding tribes.
The young Rachel Agni was fated to be raised as a prim and proper young lady behind tall walls, learning about art, music, history and other things fit for noblewomen.
But everything changed when the Agni family entered a war with the tribes.
Her grandfather, whose stalwart presence had been a core pillar of her life, had died in battle.
She was devastated to learn that the forces that had defeated her grandfather were none other than the Daybreak Mercenaries, led by the grandfather of her dearest friend, Eileene.
Suddenly, her family seemed on the verge of crumbling. In the ensuing chaos, the position of family head was thrust upon the young lady.
When all seemed lost, Rachel was able to turn the crisis into opportunity.
The Shard of Destruction within her had given her power that no other person could match.
She laid down her pen to pick up a sword and called out to phoenix Agni, her family's dormant guardian and namesake. The flaming bird gladly answered her call.
She was able to command the power of the Shard of Destruction and the phoenix Agni in mere weeks.
She used her newfound might to drive her enemies out of her home and unite the surrounding tribes under her banner, becoming the ruler of the Blazing Desert.
